2022-T3-P1-S16.trunk: 时间从句+主句：As …, the centre was … looking to a time when …（随着…，该中心同时憧憬着一个…的时代）
structure: 时间状语从句(As)：As science and technology progressed, and divided into more sub-disciplines（并列谓语 progressed / divided）
主句：the centre was simultaneously looking to a time …
└ 定语从句〔when，修饰 a time〕：when leading researchers could also be artists, writers and poets, and vice versa
2022-T3-P1-S16.logic: As 时间从句（随着…，并列谓语 progressed/divided）；主句 the centre was looking to a time；when 定语从句修饰 a time（and vice versa 反之亦然）。
notes: As 引导时间状语从句（随着…），从句内并列谓语 progressed and divided。
look to a time when…：when 定语从句修饰 a time（憧憬一个…的时代）。
and vice versa：反之亦然（艺术家也可以是科学家）。

2022-T3-P1-S3.trunk: 并列双分句(;and)：① Nearly 40% … said they had collaborated … ② almost all said they would consider doing so …
structure: 分句①：Nearly 40% of the roughly 350 people … said (that) they had collaborated with artists
├ 定语从句〔who，修饰 people〕：who responded to an accompanying poll
└ 宾语从句(省略 that)：they had collaborated with artists
分号 + and 分句②：almost all said they would consider doing so in future
└ 宾语从句(省略 that)：they would consider doing so in future
2022-T3-P1-S3.logic: 分句① 主语 40% of the people（who 定语从句修饰），said (that)…；分号+and 接分句② almost all said (that)…；doing so 替代前文动作。
notes: who responded to an accompanying poll：who 定语从句修饰 people。
said (that) they had collaborated…：省略 that 的宾语从句。
consider doing so：consider + 动名词；doing so 替代 collaborating with artists。

2022-T3-P1-S17.trunk: 并列双分句(but)：① findings suggest that this trend is as strong as ever ② both sides need to invest time, and embrace …
structure: 分句①：Nature's poll findings suggest that this trend is as strong as ever
└ 宾语从句(that)：this trend is as strong as ever
并列(but)分句②：both sides need to invest time, and embrace surprise and challenge
├ 不定式作目的状语(插入)：to make a collaboration work（make + 宾 + 宾补 work）
└ 并列不定式(need to)：to invest time, and (to) embrace surprise and challenge
2022-T3-P1-S17.logic: but 连接两分句；分句① suggest that…（as strong as ever）；分句② to make…work 目的状语插入，主句 both sides need to invest… and embrace…（并列不定式）。
notes: as strong as ever：as…as ever（一如既往地强劲）。
to make a collaboration work：不定式作目的状语（make + 宾语 + 宾补 work，使合作奏效）。
need to invest… and embrace…：need to 后并列不定式。
